# Robert Van Liew — llms.txt
# https://robertvanliew.com/

## Who is Robert Van Liew?

Robert Van Liew is a Product Designer and Front-End Developer based in New York, NY.
He specializes in interaction design, design systems, and AI-assisted product workflows.

## Current Focus

Robert is pursuing a Product Designer 2 role at Intuit (QuickBooks Platform),
with deep expertise in fintech UX, data-dense interface design, and accessibility-first systems.

## Key Projects

- **Smart Deductions** — A client-side financial analytics tool for LLC owners and self-employed
  individuals. Parses bank statements locally in the browser (no server storage), auto-categorizes
  transactions against IRS Schedule C categories, and exports TurboTax-ready reports.
  61% auto-categorization rate, <5s parse time, ~80% user acceptance of AI suggestions.

- **DMC Canada '26** — Full brand and commerce platform for a competitive dance event.
  Delivered in 6 days from Figma to production. Lighthouse 94/100, zero revision rounds,
  full Stripe payment integration.

## Skills & Tools

Figma, React, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Figma AI, Claude/Gemini for prototyping.
WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility, semantic color token systems, motion design.
